name: Sip
description: A cozy new tab page with 9 beautiful color schemes, quick links, bookmark import, and extensive customization. Desktop Firefox only.
author: Bryan Gibson
content_security_policy: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; default-src 'self'
